title: FINDMAG 6 Pack Strong Neodymium Magnet Hooks, Strong Magnetic Hooks for Fridge, Magnetic Hook for Cruise, Magnet Hook for Hanging, Kitchen, Bathroom, Garage, Grill
features: 🌟【Strong Magnetic Hooks】 – Made from excellent materials made of neodymium-iron-boron. 6 Pack Magnetic Hooks with super strong magnetic base,16 mm diameter. Fridge magnet hook, with silver coating magnetic hooks anti-corrosion and moisture proof.

🌟【Sturdy and Durable】 – Ni+Cu+Ni Triple Layer Coated. Our magnets with premium quality coating, which provide excellent corrosion resistance with a shiny and smooth finish that doesn't rust or scratch. This beautiful and durable silver hook can help you easily tidy up your clutter and make a new look at your home!

🌟【Extensive Applications】 – Magnetic hooks can be used for camping, doors, kitchens, bathrooms, cabinets, garages, workplaces, lockers, gyms, sheds,cruises, etc. Please give full play to your imagination, its use is endless!
🌟【Easy to Use】 – No need to install hardware , just mount them on any flat metal surface. No more holes or scratches will be left in your walls,refrigerator or furniture.
🌟【WARNING: AGE 15+ ONLY】Contains strong magnets. Hazardous if swallowed or placed near medical devices. Keep out of reach of all children under 15 years of age.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Magnetic Hooks for Home 2 Hooks for Cabinets 3 Hooks for Warehouses 4 Hooks for Cruises 5 Magnetic Hooks for Grills Exceptionally Strong Magnetic Force, Extremely Convenient to Use Powerful Magnetic Force Neodymium magnets possess extremely strong magnetic force. Three-Layer Coating Ni+Cu+Ni three-layer coating ensures corrosion resistance and rust prevention. Easy Disassembly Installation or disassembly of the hooks is effortless. High-Quality Base The base is encased in a high-quality steel ring to protect the internal neodymium magnet from damage.
